keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $717.16 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $750.86 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bullish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $717.16 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NVDA CALL — enter $9.04–$10.00, target $14.28+, stop $5.71.
Earnings risk: NFLX (AMC), JPM (BMO) — avoid holding short premium through the print.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +0.76% and SPY +0.23%. Composite sentiment +33 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by market breadth (a/d), qqq / mega-cap tech, vix. VIX at 14.26 (-1.47%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Industrials (+1.71%) is leading while Healthcare (-2.48%) lags. Premarket strength in AMD, JPM; weakness in LLY, MSFT. The desk's highest-conviction setup is NVDA (7.1/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
